title: Market Efficiency: According to the efficient market hypothesis, it is impossible to...
summary: Evaluate the efficient market hypothesis and its implications for investment returns.
prompt: According to the efficient market hypothesis, it is impossible to consistently achieve higher returns than the overall market without taking on additional risk.
solution: This statement encapsulates the essence of the efficient market hypothesis, which asserts that all available information is reflected in stock prices, making it difficult to outperform the market consistently.
